description: This episode discusses the upcoming Solana community-led hackathon from August 1st to 21st, a proposal for querying active stake on the cluster, updates to Anchor's IDL generation, and the release of Switchboard Functions.
topic_summary: Highlights include the Solana hackathon [t=7:12], a proposal on active stake querying [t=53:29], updates to Anchor's IDL [t=118:26], and the introduction of Switchboard Functions [t=166:62].
